nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines Swift coding style rules for the ECC harness covering formatting, immutability preferences, naming conventions, error handling with typed throws, and structured concurrency with async/await.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Specifies Swift-specific Claude Code hook rules, describing when PostToolUse hooks should trigger formatting and linting after file edits, along with a warning about keeping hooks non-blocking.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents recommended Swift architectural patterns including protocol-oriented design, value types with structs/enums, the Actor pattern for concurrency safety, and constructor-based dependency injection.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Outlines Swift security rules covering secret management via Keychain (never hardcoded), transport security with App Transport Security enforcement, and input validation patterns for sanitizing user-supplied data.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Prescribes Swift testing standards using Apple's Swift Testing framework, requiring test isolation, parameterized tests via @Test with arguments, and minimum 80% coverage thresholds enforced by CI.
